productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Ct As Rolldown Hi Black Casual Shoes
description: Up your style quotient with these classic Roll Down high top shoes from converse. Team this comfy pair of sneakers with jeans and bioworld tees for a great casual look.UpperCanvas upper for durability and protectionLace-ups for snug FitMetal eyelets for the laces for greater eye appeal and durabilityAll Star heel patch on the ankleRubber toe box for greater protection to the forefootMidsoleCushioned insole for all day comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater grip and durabilityWash careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
